articles.description: People with depression experience a measurable shift in their expectations for reward, making pleasure harder to achieve. A new study in the Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences finds a simple game can quickly detect this change.
articles.content: A new study published in the Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences provides evidence that people with depression experience a measurable shift in their expectations for pleasure, making it … [+8281 chars]
